title: Emerson Appoints Michael Tang as Chief Legal Officer
text: Tang to succeed Sara Yang Bosco, who will retire after 18-year Emerson career ST. LOUIS , Nov. 30, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Emerson (NYSE: EMR), a leader in automation software and technology, today announced the appointment of Michael Tang as senior vice president, secretary and chief legal officer, effective Jan. 1, 2024.

title: DG Fuels Selects Emerson Engineering and Automation Portfolio to Support Sustainable Transportation Biofuels Production

title: Emerson Electric 4Q financial results fall short; stock slides
text: Emerson Electric (NYSE:EMR) Co on Tuesday announced fourth quarter 2023 adjusted earnings per share (EPS) of $1.29, just shy of the $1.30 analyst consensus forecast provided by Zacks Equity Research.  The maker of process controls systems, valves and analytical instruments generated revenue of $4.09 billion during the period, which also missed Wall Street expectations of $4.2 billion.
